data.title: Lincoln Educational Services Corporation Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release And Conference Call
data.description: Parsippany-based Lincoln Educational Services Corporation (Nasdaq: LINC) disclosed plans for a conference call to review its Q1 financial performance on May 11, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. EST. Ahead of the call, scheduled an hour before at 9:30 a.m. EST, a press release highlighting Lincoln's results will be issued. Participants can join the conference call to gain insights into the company's financial standing and strategies going forward.
Iran tells mediators that the re-opening of Hormuz is still limited - WSJ.

data.title: Mesa Royalty Trust Announces Trust Income for April 2026
data.description: The Mesa Royalty Trust (NYSE: MTR) revealed its income distribution for April 2026, with unitholders of record on April 30 set to receive $0.040259155 per unit on July 31. This distribution amount stems from the Trust's San Juan Basin properties in New Mexico, operated by Hilcorp San Juan LP, an affiliate of Hilcorp Energy Company, which contributed $96,591. Notably, no additional income was received by the Trust during April 2026.

data.title: UNITED BANCSHARES, INC. ANNOUNCES FIRST QUARTER 2026 RESULTS AND $0.25 DIVIDEND
data.description: In Columbus Grove, Ohio on April 17, 2026, United Bancshares, Inc. (OTCQX: UBOH) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per share. Shareholders of record on May 29, 2026, will receive the dividend on June 15, 2026. The dividend amount represents a 2.48% return based on the first quarter's average closing price.

data.title: Hyundai Hosts Emergency Responders Extrication Training in Michigan
data.description: In Superior Township, Michigan, on April 17, 2026, Hyundai America Technical Center's EHS department conducted crash training extrication for local firefighters. They utilized six crashed electric vehicles to facilitate emergency training exercises. This initiative aimed to provide a safe environment for firefighters to enhance their skills in handling such situations.

data.title: Sun Life U.S. receives Top Workplaces award from Milwaukee Journal Sentinel for third consecutive year
data.description: Sun Life U.S. has been recognized as one of the Top Workplaces in Milwaukee for the third year in a row, according to the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel's 2026 rankings. Following the acquisition of DentaQuest in 2022, Sun Life expanded its operations to Wisconsin, where DentaQuest had an established office in Milwaukee. This marks Sun Life's ongoing commitment to providing a positive work environment, with a focus on employee satisfaction and success.

data.title: Permianville Royalty Trust Announces Monthly Cash Distribution
data.description: In Houston, Permianville Royalty Trust (NYSE: PVL) disclosed a cash distribution of $0.010000 per unit to unit holders, scheduled for payment on May 15, 2026. Unitholders of record by April 30, 2026, will be eligible for this distribution. The calculation of net profits interest is based on January 2026 oil production and December 2025 natural gas production reports, along with incurred costs in February 2026.

data.title: WM Technology, Inc. Reports Preliminary First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Irvine, California, WM Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: MAPS), a key player in cannabis industry solutions, revealed its initial financial figures for Q1, 2026. The company will release the complete results on May 11, 2026, post-market closure. The report highlighted a robust opening to the year, demonstrating consistent growth. This outlined performance offers insight into the positive trajectory of WM Technology for the financial quarter ending on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Zenas BioPharma Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On April 15, 2026, Zenas BioPharma, Inc. revealed that the Compensation Committee of the Company’s Board of Directors approved the granting of 41,475 restricted stock units (RSUs) to new employees. This move was made as an inducement for these employees to join the company. Zenas, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm listed on Nasdaq as ZBIO, specializes in developing and commercializing innovative therapies for individuals grappling with autoimmune diseases. This initiative aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: BGIN BLOCKCHAIN LIMITED Schedules the Fiscal Year 2025 Earnings and Conference Call on April 24, 2026
data.description: Singapore-based BGIN Blockchain Limited (NASDAQ: BGIN) revealed the schedule for its Fiscal Year 2025 Earnings and Conference Call. The Company, engaged in digital asset technology and cryptocurrency mining hardware manufacturing, announced the date and time for the event on April 18, 2026.
US bank deposits fell to $19.057 trln from $19.085 trln in prior week.

data.title: Cross Country Healthcare to Hold First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call on Thursday, May 7, 2026
data.description: Cross Country Healthcare, Inc. (Nasdaq: CCRN) based in Boca Raton, Florida, is set to discuss its first quarter financial results for 2026 during a quarterly conference call on Thursday, May 7 at 5:00 P.M. Eastern Time. The company plans to release its earnings press statement after the market closes on the same day. Interested parties can access the live webcast of the call on the Company's website at ir.crosscountry.com or by dialing 800-369-2163.

data.title: In HelloNation, Wealth Advisor Ted Thatcher Details Estate and Legacy Planning
data.description: In a publication from HelloNation, Ted Thatcher from Bright Lake Wealth Management in Redding, California, discussed strategies for individuals to secure the smooth transfer of their assets to their heirs. The article, dated April 17, 2026, addressed ways to minimize complications in asset distribution. It highlighted the importance of proper estate planning to ensure assets are transferred according to one's wishes. Redding, California, served as the backdrop for the insights shared by Ted Thatcher in the article.

data.title: Theriva™ Biologics Announces Upcoming Presentation of Additional Data from the VIRAGE Phase 2b Clinical Trial of VCN-01 in Metastatic Pancreatic Cancer at AACR 2026 Annual Meeting
data.description: Results from the VIRAGE Phase 2b clinical trial reveal promising data on tumor response, biomarkers, and subgroup analyses supporting the immune-mediated action of VCN-01. The study shows enhanced outcomes in VCN-01 treated patients, especially those with liver metastases. The findings attest to the effectiveness of VCN-01 across various subgroups, indicating its potential in treating cancer.

data.title: QuasarEdge Acquisition Corporation Announces Exercise of Over-Allotment Option
data.description: QuasarEdge Acquisition Corporation (NYSE: QRED U) disclosed today that the underwriters of their initial public offering have decided to exercise their over-allotment option, acquiring an extra 1,500,000 units at the set public offering rate of $10.00 each. This move elevates the total units sold to 11,500,000. The closure of this over-allotment option is set for April 21, 2026, pending the fulfillment of regular closing prerequisites.

data.title: 4DMT Announces New Employment Inducement Grants
data.description: 4D Molecular Therapeutics, based in Emeryville, California, revealed that on April 14, 2026, five new non-executive employees were granted 67,600 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) by the compensation committee of the company's board of directors. This move was made under the Company’s 2025 Employment Inducement Award Plan and as per Rule 5635(c)(4) of The Nasdaq Global Market. 4D Molecular Therapeutics is a prominent late-stage biotechnology firm focused on advancing targeted therapeutics that could revolutionize treatment approaches and deliver remarkable benefits to patients.

data.title: ORIC® Pharmaceuticals Presents Preclinical Data to Support the Potential of Rinzimetostat Across Prostate Cancer and in Emerging Resistance Settings at the 2026 American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting
data.description: Today, ORIC Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: ORIC), a clinical stage oncology company based in South San Francisco, California, and San Diego shared that they presented several posters at the 2026 American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting. These posters showcased the potential of rinzimetostat (ORIC-944), which is a powerful allosteric inhibitor of PRC2, in treating prostate cancer. The company's website contains these publications for reference.
